content.text: During cleaning we found a button labeled 'DO NOT'. Just 'DO NOT'. The label may be truncated. Or a warning. Or a dare.

reaction.text: You pressed it. Somewhere in the ship, a small light turned {pick:on|off|purple}. Nothing else happened. Yet. We've labeled it 'PROBABLY FINE'.
Restraint. The button remains unpressed, radiating potential. It will outlive us all.
